alerts.headline: Special Weather Statement issued March 3 at 7:38PM EST by NWS Boston/Norton MA
alerts.description:
Widespread rain and freezing rain will continue into the overnight
hours...but should come to an end toward daybreak.
However...residual moisture, light winds and the cold ground from
our recent weather will be favorable for the formation of black
ice. This may also be accompanied by some freezing fog too.
Motorists traveling early Wednesday morning should allow extra
time to reach their destination and be prepared for black ice.
Untreated walkways and parking lots may also become very slippery
for pedestrians. Temperatures should rise above freezing by mid-
late Wednesday morning alleviating any black ice issues.

nws_forecast.name: Overnight
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog and a chance of freezing rain. Cloudy, with a low around 31. Northwest wind around 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. Little or no ice accumulation expected.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Areas Of Fog then Mostly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog before 8am. Mostly sunny, with a high near 46. Southwest wind 3 to 8 mph. Little or no ice accumulation expected.

nws_forecast.name: Wednesday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog after 11pm. Partly cloudy, with a low around 29. Southwest wind around 5 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday
nws_forecast.detailed: Areas of fog before 8am, then a chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a high near 39. East wind 2 to 6 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Thursday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain likely before 11pm, then rain and snow. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Northeast wind 7 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday
nws_forecast.detailed: Rain and snow before 5pm. Cloudy, with a high near 39. Northeast wind around 10 mph, with gusts as high as 21 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New snow accumulation of less than half an inch possible.

nws_forecast.name: Friday Night
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Cloudy then Slight Chance Light Rain
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain after 3am. Cloudy, with a low around 34. Southeast wind 3 to 7 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly cloudy, with a high near 50. South wind 5 to 12 mph, with gusts as high as 22 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Saturday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: A chance of rain. Mostly cloudy, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 12 mph, with gusts as high as 23 mph. Chance of precipitation is 50%.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday
nws_forecast.short_forecast: Slight Chance Light Rain then Partly Sunny
nws_forecast.detailed: A slight chance of rain before 9am. Partly sunny, with a high near 51. West wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Sunday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Partly cloudy, with a low around 38. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 55. Southwest wind around 9 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Monday Night
nws_forecast.detailed: Mostly clear, with a low around 41. Southwest wind around 8 mph.

nws_forecast.name: Tuesday
nws_forecast.detailed: Sunny, with a high near 59. Southwest wind around 9 mph.
